##RRUFFID=R140106
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ag_z_Tl_8-x-z_Pb_4+2x_Sb_40-x-y_As_y_S_68_ (with 0.00 ≤ x ≤ 0.40, 16.15 ≤ y ≤ 19.11, 0.04 ≤ z ≤ 0.11)
##LOCALITY=Jas Roux, La Chapelle En Valgaudemard, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte D'Azur, France
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Black metallic grains with conchoidal fracture, associated with red realgar, yellow braded or fibrous wakabayashilite (R150064), and colorless massive or tabular celestine.

##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140106
